basic_details.job_title: Gujarat University Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 28 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat University Non Teaching Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 05-05-2026 on the official website of Gujarat University. A total of 28 vacancies have been announced through the GU Non-Teaching Posts Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have Graduate to Master’s degree qualifications are eligible to apply for these Non-Teaching Posts vacancies. The online application process for GU Non-Teaching Posts Recruitment 2026 has started on 05-05-2026 and will remain open until 24-05-2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply online through the direct links provided

qualification.details: Placement Manager: Bachelor's degree in Management / HR / Business Administration / Commerce / Engineering / Science or related discipline from a recognized university. Minimum 1 year of relevant experience in placement, corporate relations, career services, or HR functions. Admission Counsellor Cum Marketing/Branding and Sales Head: Minimum Master's degree from a recognized university. Minimum 5 years of experience in academic admission counselling in colleges, universities, or academic organizations. Accountant: M.Com OR B.Com with Post Graduate Diploma in Finance or related field from a recognized university. Minimum 8 years relevant experience in accounting, finance, fee reconciliation, GST/TDS, Tally, Excel and administrative support required. Assistant Accountant cum Admin: M.Com OR B.Com from a recognized university. Minimum 2 years relevant experience in accounting, Tally, GST/TDS, fee reconciliation, Excel and administrative support preferred. Senior Administration Executive: Master's degree from a recognized university. Candidates must have at least 5 years of relevant experience or industry experience after obtaining the qualifying degree. Junior Administration Executive: Any Graduate. Candidates must have at least 2 years of relevant experience or industry experience after obtaining the qualifying degree. Job Trainee - Admin: Any Graduate. Fresher candidates with communication skills, telecalling, counselling support, student follow-up, office records and basic computer skills. Job Trainee - Accounts: B.Com or related degree from a recognized university. Freshers with basic knowledge of accounting practices are eligible. IT/IMS Coordinator: Master's degree in Computer Science / IT / AI-ML / Data Science or related technical field. Minimum 5 years experience in university AND/OR 2 years experience managing ERP / IMS / CRM systems. Technical Assistant / IT Support: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science / IT / Computer Applications / Computer Engineering or related IT field. Minimum 1 year experience in IT support, networking, system administration or lab management. Job Trainee - Lab Assistant: Bachelor's degree / diploma in IT, Computer Science, Computer Applications or related technical field. Freshers may apply. Basic technical exposure in computer lab support, software installation or hardware troubleshooting preferred. Senior Camera Operator: Master's degree in Visual Communication / Mass Communication OR graduate from reputed Film School / Media Institute. Minimum 10 years experience in camera operation, studio/live production, NDI workflows and multi-camera environments. Junior Camera Operator: Bachelor's degree in Visual Communication / Mass Communication OR graduate from reputed Film School / Media Institute. Minimum 3 years experience in camera operation / live production. Exceptional fresh graduates with strong hands-on NDI portfolio may be considered. Video Editor: Bachelor's degree in Visual Communication / Mass Communication / Film & Media OR graduate from reputed Film School / Media Institute OR equivalent professional experience with strong portfolio. Minimum 8-10 years experience in video editing, live production and TriCaster-based workflows. Senior Studio Technician: Bachelor's degree / diploma in Media Technology, Electronics, Sound Engineering, Film/TV Production, Audio-Visual Technology or related field. Minimum 5 years experience in studio technology, lighting, cabling, equipment maintenance or audio-visual production support. Junior Studio Technician: Bachelor's degree / diploma in Media Technology, Electronics, Sound Engineering, Film/TV Production, Audio-Visual Technology or related field. 0-2 years experience or hands-on training in studio setup, lighting assistance, cabling, equipment handling or audio-visual production support.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Admission Counsellor Cum Marketing/Branding and Sales Head

salary_details.Senior Camera Operator: Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 60,000 (Fixed consolidated monthly salary)
salary_details.Junior Camera Operator: Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 30,000 (Fixed consolidated monthly salary)
salary_details.Video Editor: Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 50,000 (Fixed consolidated monthly salary)
salary_details.Senior Studio Technician: Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 40,000 (Fixed consolidated monthly salary)
salary_details.Junior Studio Technician: Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 25,000 (Fixed consolidated monthly salary)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Gujarat University Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gujarat University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gujarat University Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Gujarat University Non-Teaching Posts is 24 May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Gujarat University Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 28 vacancies announced for various Non-Teaching Posts at Gujarat University. These positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Gujarat University Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification ranges from a Bachelor's degree to a Master's degree in various disciplines, depending on the specific post applied for.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official recruitment portal to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the Non-Teaching Posts at Gujarat University?
faq.answer: The salaries for the Non-Teaching Posts range from Rs. 18,000 to Rs. 60,000 per month, with specific consolidated amounts for each post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for Gujarat University Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Gujarat University Non-Teaching Posts recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The Non-Teaching Posts at Gujarat University are offered on a contract basis, typically for a period of 11 months.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for Gujarat University Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for Gujarat University recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for Gujarat University recruitment is www.gucpc.in. All application and related information will be available here.
